response.overview: The documentary shows how, through a journey, Laly Madueño attempts to discover herself, confront her fears, and face everything she enjoyed and hated from the past. It is a journey not only of space but, above all, of inner, emotional, and therapeutic exploration, with the sole purpose of letting go of nostalgia and coping with it in order to move forward and face what lies ahead. It is a journey to the city of Moquegua, where she finally settled after a long period of moving to different cities in the interior of the country due to her parents' work. She rediscovers her physical and temporal space, and what lies within it: her longings, dreams, and frustrations.
response.title: Mi lugar
